positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed celestial floral mandala pattern. The design features stylized constellations merging seamlessly with intricate, symmetrical botanicals like hummingbirds' feathers, lotuses, and crescent moons. The style should evoke a modern Art Deco meets psychedelic illustration aesthetic, optimized for screen printing. Use deep indigo, burnt orange, rich gold, and mint green as the primary color palette, creating high contrast against a solid background. The composition must be centered, clean, and abstract, with strong, continuous lines and bold silhouettes, avoiding photorealism to ensure print versatility. Intricate line work, vector graphics style, high symmetry.
negative: photorealism, blur, noise, artifacts, text, signature, logo, watermark, low detail, bad composition, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, mutated, amateur drawing, childish, messy, ugly
